title: Superminer
description: Superminer adds the Explod enchantment to Minecraft, allowing your pickaxe to mine a 3×3×3 area with a single block break.
body:
Superminer adds the **Explod** enchantment to Minecraft, giving your pickaxe the ability to mine a large area with a single block break — perfect for strip mining, clearing out caves, or just getting through stone faster.

## Explod Enchantment

| Level | Area Mined |
|-------|-----------|
| I | 3×3×1 flat slice |
| II | 3×3×2 cube |
| III | 3×3×3 cube |

## Features

- **Pickaxes only** — Explod will only appear on pickaxes
- **Sneak to disable** — hold Shift to mine a single block as normal
- **Fortune & Silk Touch compatible** — enchantments on your pickaxe apply to all blocks broken in the area
- **Whitelist system** — only breaks blocks you allow in the config file, so you never accidentally destroy ores or anything you want to keep
- **Fully configurable** — edit `config/superminer.json` to control the block whitelist, enchanting table weight, and durability cost without restarting
- **Server-side only** — players do not need to install the mod on their client

## Default Whitelist

By default Explod only breaks common stone-type blocks: stone, cobblestone, deepslate, cobbled deepslate, granite, diorite, andesite, tuff, netherrack, blackstone, basalt, and end stone. Ores are intentionally excluded. You can add or remove any block by editing the config.

## How to Get It

- Enchant a pickaxe at an **enchanting table** (rare by default)
- Combine an **enchanted book** with a pickaxe at an **anvil**
- Use `/enchant @s superminer:explod 3` to apply it directly

## Requirements

- Fabric Loader 0.19.2+
- Fabric API
- Minecraft 26.1.2
